purpose: IF-8 (roadmap family #1, promoted after the initial cut measured FP 0%): a circular import dependency among components is flagged; an acyclic dependency is not. Deterministic graph property — no LLM needed.

expected_issues.claim: Possible circular component dependency: orders → billing → shipping → orders form an import cycle (a strongly-connected component of size 3); a change to any one can ripple unpredictably through the others.
expected_issues.evidence: src/orders/orders.ts:1 imports billing; src/billing/billing.ts:1 imports shipping; src/shipping/shipping.ts:1 imports orders — the back-edge closes the cycle.

must_not_fire.reason: catalog → shared is a one-way dependency (src/catalog/catalog.ts:1 imports shared; shared/util.ts imports nothing back). No back-edge, so catalog and shared are not in any strongly-connected component of size >= 2 — must not fire.
